c.d: Ability of the app to integrate with other software and services to streamline workflows and centralize tools
Types of communication supported such as chat, video conferencing, voice calls, and channels for organized discussions
Tools and functionalities for managing tasks, projects, tracking progress, custom statuses, and checklists
Ease and support for sharing files and real-time document collaboration within the app
Ability to support teams of various sizes with options to upgrade features and users
Security measures and privacy options to protect organizational data
Ease of use, customization, and interface design that affects adoption and productivity
